title: phymatopteris engleri
intro: Phymatopteris engleri is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae, commonly known as the marsh fern. The medicinal properties of Phymatopteris engleri include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits associated with the plant include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues. Phymatopteris engleri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional folk medicine remedies.
